title: Not Microsoft Edition!
description: Originally from a PhoenixSC video, now available for version 1.20 and newer!
body:
Originally from [this](https://youtu.be/QNBs-m6TvmQ) PhoenixSC video.
A few people have recreated this, and now I'm doing the same, but for the updated title graphics!

You can add this to your modpack as long as it's on Modrinth, make sure to shout me out!

***!! DO NOT REUPLOAD ANY OF MY RESOURCE PACKS ANYWHERE !!***

**Please, if you have any spare..*anything*, [consider buying me a coffee!](https://buymeacoffee.com/kckarnige)**
